profile.cvText: Subu Rentala gibraltor999@gmail.com | +44-7448997441 | London, United Kingdom | https://www.linkedin.com/in/subu-rentala-35265544/ PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY I am a hands-on, strategic Quality Engineering Principal Architect with 20 years of experience leading digital transformation, enterprise-wide quality strategies, and GenAI-enabled testing across Web, Cloud, API, Data and Mobile platforms. I develop and mentor high-performing teams, implement automation frameworks using a range of programming and scripting languages, and promote a culture of quality excellence. I bring together strategic thinking, client engagement, people leadership and thought leadership to enable organisations to deliver faster, smarter, and more dependable software, whilst embedding quality best practices at every level and positioning Quality Engineering as a business-critical discipline. SOFTWARE PROFICIENCY Category Tools and Technologies Languages Java, Python, C#, Typescript, JavaScript, Groovy, UNIX, Perl, Batch, PowerShell Web & Mobile Automation Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, Appium API Automation RestAssured, SOAPUI, Postman, Axios Cloud/CI/CD Azure (Service Bus, Logic and Function Apps), AWS, GCP, Jenkins, TeamCity Cross Browser Platforms Saucelabs, Perfecto, Browserstack Accessibility & Visual Axe-core, pa11y, Percy, Applitools, wdio image-service Performance & Security JMeter, K6, SonarQube, OWASP ZAP Data Testing Tools Kafka, Databricks, Snowflake, Tableau, Pyspark, dbt tests, Deequ AI Tools Co Pilot, AWS Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, Vertex AI+ GenAI Studio, Anthropic Claude Test Management JIRA, TestRails, Mercury Test Director Databases DynamoDB, MongoDB, MySQL Other Tools TestNG, Junit, Cucumber, Specflow, Maven, Gradle, Git, SVN, Mockito, Docker, JaCoCo WORK EXPERIENCE Slalom UK | London | Senior Principal Quality Engineering | Aug 2021- Present Slalom is a global management consultancy focused on strategy, technology and business transformation. Roles and Responsibilities  Test Strategy Development: Designed and implemented test strategies improving accuracy and robustness by 30%.  Defect Reduction and AI Validation: Reduced chatbot errors by 25% through advanced AI quality engineering practices using RAGAS AI test framework.  Performance and Scalability Testing: Increased user satisfaction by 20% and validated scalability for 3x higher user loads leveraging K6 performance tool.  Cross-Platform Stability Testing: Reduced app crashes by 35% on iOS and Android with targeted testing using Appium.  Automation and Coverage Enhancement: Accelerated delivery by 25% and improved test coverage by 40% via automated testing frameworks -Playwright, Cypress and Copilot.  Regression Optimizations: Increased test coverage by 45% and cut regression testing time by 50% using Playwright FW.  Team Collaboration and Leadership: Improved delivery efficiency by 30% by leading cross-functional QA teams.  End-to-End Data Validation: Led comprehensive testing across ingestion, transformation, and storage layers to ensure reliable data flow.  Real-Time Pipeline Testing: Verified Kafka and Spark Streaming pipelines for data accuracy, latency, and performance.  Data Quality & Reconciliation: Performed schema validation and reconciliation checks between data lake and warehouse systems.  Automation & Efficiency: Built automated validation suites using Python, PySpark, and SQL, accelerating test cycles. Technical Skill summary: Playwright, Cypress, Appium, K6, CoPilot, Pyspark, SQL, Python, Databricks, Snowflake. Cigniti UK | London | Senior QA Manager | Jan 2016- Jul 2021 Cigniti Technologies (UK) is a leading AI and IP-led digital assurance and engineering services company. It provides comprehensive software quality engineering, testing, automation, and consulting services to help global enterprises accelerate digital transformation and achieve market leadership. Roles and Responsibilities  Quality Engineering Transformation: Modernized QE using Playwright, Cypress, and cloud testing on AWS Device Farm and Azure Test Plans, accelerating releases by 25% and reducing delivery time by 30%.  Shift-Left Testing & CI/CD: Integrated Playwright and Cypress with Azure DevOps Pipelines and AWS CodeBuild, enabling early testing and cutting critical defects by 40%.  Test Automation & Scheduling: Automated regression scheduling via GitHub Actions and Azure Functions, improving test cycle efficiency by 40%.  Test Execution & Defect Management: Executed 500+ automated tests across multi-browser and cloud-hosted environments on AWS EC2 and Azure VMs, maintaining 85%+ pass rates and reducing prod defects by 20%.  Stakeholder Collaboration: Enhanced visibility through Azure Monitor dashboards and AWS CloudWatch alerts, improving test coordination and reducing post-release issues by 15%. Pramati Technologies | USA, India | Principal Engineer | Mar 2014 –Dec 2015 Roles and Responsibilities  End-to-End Product Testing: Led front-end and back-end validation using Selenium WebDriver and REST API clients, ensuring seamless system functionality.  Accessibility & Visual Quality: Implemented Axe Core for accessibility compliance and Applitools for visual regression testing, improving UI reliability.  Performance Engineering: Utilized K6 to simulate load and measure system scalability and response times.  Security & Code Quality: Integrated SonarQube scans into CI pipelines to detect vulnerabilities & enforce coding standards.  Automation Impact: Enhanced test coverage across UI, API, and performance layers, reducing production issues and improving release confidence. Exponential Technologies | India | Sr.QA Manager | May 2013 – Feb 2014 Roles and Responsibilities  End-to-End Data Testing: Validated data pipelines powering website advertising banners, ensuring accurate campaign targeting and tracking.  ETL & Transformation Validation: Used SQL and Python to verify ad impression, click, and revenue data across ingestion and warehouse layers.  Reconciliation & Accuracy Checks: Compared banner performance data between data lake, warehouse, and reporting dashboards to ensure consistency.  Data Quality Automation: Built automated validation scripts using PySpark and SQL, reducing manual checks and improving reliability.  Analytics Integrity: Ensured that marketing and performance dashboards reflected accurate ad metrics, improving business insights and decision-making. Xebia IT Architect | India | Senior Consultant | Nov 2011 – Apr 2013 Roles and Responsibilities  Built a robust end-to-end web automation framework for a healthcare client using Selenium, enabling faster and reliable regression cycles.  Designed and executed REST API testing for backend validation, ensuring data accuracy and secure integrations.  Performed mobile app testing across platforms using Appium, improving release quality and user experience consistency. SAMSUNG | Thailand, India | Senior Software Engineer | Mar 2010 – Oct 2011 Roles and Responsibilities  Led handset testing for telecom devices, covering network, protocol, and compliance testing across multiple regions and network providers.  Managed a team of 11 engineers, coordinating global testing efforts to ensure consistent quality standards.  Conducted on-site network validation across regions worldwide, verifying performance with various telecom operators.  Ensured devices met regulatory & operator compliance, improving launch readiness and reducing post-release issues. HCL Technologies | India | Software Engineer | Aug 2005 – Feb 2010 Roles and Responsibilities  Performed quality assurance testing on handsets/web applications, ensuring functionality and usability across devices.  Conducted end-to-end testing of the Microsoft Bing platform, validating search and user experience features.  Automated test tasks and data validations using Unix/Linux shell scripting, improving efficiency on Linux systems. CONTRIBUTIONS To support the QE community and enhance knowledge sharing, I have contributed through blogs, GitHub projects, thought leadership, and best practice guidance. Technical Blogs https://rvsubrahmanyam.wordpress.com/ GitHub Projects https://github.com/Subrahmanyam83/ CERTIFICATIONS Certifications Passing % Year of Completion Microsoft Azure Fundamentals – AZ-900 85.00% June-2022 ISTQB (International Software Testing Qualifications Board) 75.00% Aug-2008 JLPT (Japanese Language Proficiency Test) – Level -3 83.75% Nov-2005 CMMi-Level Certification 91.00% Mar-2009 EDUCATION Degree Institute/University Percentage Duration MBA(IT) Symbiosis University, India 70% 2011- 2013 B.Tech(CSE) Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University, India 80% 2001-2005
